title: Spendthrift
writer: Raoul Walsh, Bert Hanlon, Eric Hatch
actors: Henry Fonda, Pat Paterson, Mary Brian
plot: Profligate Townsend "Towny" Middleton, once the possessor of $20,000,000, becomes a "millionaire with everything but money." In order to enter his filly "Black Mamba" in the Kentucky Derby, Towny sells his polo horses. At Churchil...
